overall.description: First-person perspective bus driving gameplay in a rainy urban environment. The player operates a city bus through Berlin streets, navigating wet roads with active windshield wipers while stopping at designated bus stops to pick up passengers. The simulation features detailed vehicle interiors and modern city architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop departure area at urban intersection

events.description: pedestrian crosses the road in front of the stopped bus
bus accelerates from stationary position and merges into traffic

agents.ego_description: operating the bus, initially waiting at the stop then accelerating onto the main road

notable_agents.action: crossing the street in front of the stopped bus

entered.detail: driver's instrument panel with MAN logo and digital displays
teal-colored digital display showing route information
large wipers clearing heavy rain from windshield
glass and metal passenger shelter at Alexanderplatz
contemporary glass building with reflective facade

segments.scene_description: The segment begins with the bus stationary at a stop in heavy rain, windshield wipers active. A pedestrian crosses in front of the vehicle before the bus accelerates and merges onto the main road, passing modern glass office buildings.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane urban arterial road with modern office buildings

events.description: bus overtakes a white truck on the left side
passing dense row of street trees on the right side

agents.ego_description: cruising at steady speed down the wet multi-lane street with wipers active

notable_agents.action: white truck traveling in the left lane

entered.detail: row of mature trees lining the sidewalk
blue circular bus stop signs and traffic markers

segments.scene_description: The bus travels along a wide multi-lane city street in heavy rain, passing modern glass buildings and overtaking a white truck. Street trees line the right sidewalk while windshield wipers maintain visibility through the downpour.

scene_state.functional_zone: bus stop on Prenzlauer Allee with passenger boarding

events.description: bus decelerates and comes to a complete stop at the bus stop
bus doors open and passenger in red shirt boards the vehicle
bus doors close after passenger boarding is complete

agents.ego_description: bringing the bus to a halt at the designated stop and opening doors for passenger pickup

notable_agents.action: waiting at the bus shelter then entering through the front door

entered.detail: covered bus shelter with glass panels and bench

segments.scene_description: The bus approaches and stops at the Prenzlauer Allee bus stop, opening its doors to allow a passenger to board. The vehicle remains stationary with doors open during the boarding process before closing them to prepare for departure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a bus driver's seat as the vehicle navigates a rain-slicked urban corridor between two designated stops. It begins stationary in a heavy downpour with active windshield wipers, waiting for a pedestrian to cross before accelerating and merging into the flow of traffic past modern glass office buildings. As the bus gains speed along a wide multi-lane street, the camera captures the blur of street trees and the overtaking of a white truck through the persistent rain. The scene then shifts as the vehicle slows its momentum, eventually coming to a complete halt at the Prenzlauer Allee stop. The sequence concludes with the doors opening to admit a boarding passenger before closing once more in preparation for departure.
